title: metastelma cubense
intro: Metastelma cubense, also known as Cuban Metastelma or Cubense Metastelma, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Metastelma cubense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
